task_completion.description: The ReqView application is open and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The SRS document is selected and displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SRS' document tab or section is highlighted or active in the ReqView interface, showing its contents in the main view.

task_completion.description: The target requirement is located and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A requirement containing the text 'minimum password length of 12 characters' is visible in the main document view.

task_completion.description: The agent interacts with the status attribute of the target requirement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown menu, edit dialog, or inline editing interface for the Status attribute of the target requirement is open or actively being clicked.

task_completion.description: The status of the target requirement is updated to 'Ready'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Status column or field for the target requirement explicitly displays 'Ready' instead of 'Draft'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView graphical user interface to update the status.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ReqView application, not a terminal or text editor modifying the SRS.json file.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: The status change is applied specifically to the requirement containing the 'minimum password length' text, not to other requirements.

integrity.description: The text of the requirement was not altered.
integrity.visual_evidence: The requirement text remains 'The system shall enforce a minimum password length of 12 characters for all user accounts.' and was not replaced or edited.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target document is 'SRS'. The target requirement contains the text 'minimum password length'. Its initial status is 'Draft', and the target status to be set is 'Ready'.
